title: The Escape Narrows Around the Sunny
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Chiffon, Bege as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's get away from 'em now, while we can!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: If we stop, we're done for!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got to get started on the Deco- ration!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hurry! We don't have much time!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 13 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
